* It makes me realize

* It would fix everything.
* But even when I finally found that "proof" I wanted...
* ... I still failed to protect you.

obj_ch5_DW30_slash_Step_0_gml_227_0: * Kris, Kris! Thank goodness you're okay!

obj_ch5_DW30_slash_Step_0_gml_551_0: * Kris... I'm sorry. I'm sorry for not realizing sooner.
obj_ch5_DW30_slash_Step_0_gml_553_0: * ... I would love to see the both of you together.
obj_ch5_DW30_slash_Step_0_gml_554_0: * Even... without your mother, if she prefers.
obj_ch5_DW30_slash_Step_0_gml_591_0: * It seems that while I wasn't looking...

obj_ch5_DW30_slash_Step_0_gml_718_0: * ... you do know I was just playing along, right?

obj_ch5_DW30_slash_Step_0_gml_720_0: * If anything, your actions toward me...
obj_ch5_DW30_slash_Step_0_gml_722_0: * How it feels, to receive... such unasked-for affection.

obj_ch5_DW30_slash_Step_0_gml_752_0: * Well... I did. It was, well, very thoughtful.
obj_ch5_DW30_slash_Step_0_gml_753_0: * At times, you seemed... like a really lovely person.
obj_ch5_DW30_slash_Step_0_gml_756_0: * Asgore, listen! This world, it's perfect for you!
obj_ch5_DW30_slash_Step_0_gml_757_0: * I've seen how alone you are! You want to go BACK!?
obj_ch5_DW30_slash_Step_0_gml_75_0: * It's not right!! We have to defeat you!!! We have to!!!
obj_ch5_DW30_slash_Step_0_gml_775_0: * Flowery. Even if I wanted to... I couldn't stay.
obj_ch5_DW30_slash_Step_0_gml_779_0: * Back in the real world, my shop is waiting.
obj_ch5_DW30_slash_Step_0_gml_780_0: * It's not right to leave it empty.

obj_ch5_DW30_slash_Step_0_gml_89_0: * Why didn't you counter my attack?!
obj_ch5_DW30_slash_Step_0_gml_90_0: * Are you giving up on your father now!?
obj_ch5_DW30_slash_Step_0_gml_97_0: * We can't fight you until you stand up!

obj_ch5_DW40_slash_Step_0_gml_900_0: * Kris... the Fountain... is waiting for you.
obj_ch5_DW40_slash_Step_0_gml_976_0: * This dream was always set to end.

obj_ch5_DW45_slash_Step_0_gml_87_0: * Kris, I'm sorry. I can't say that enough.

obj_ch5_LW07_slash_Step_0_gml_647_0: * Okay But Not Now It's Too Formal
obj_ch5_LW07_slash_Step_0_gml_650_0: * How about I just try on the, uh, hat?
obj_ch5_LW07_slash_Step_0_gml_671_0: * (You mean the part we didn't select...?)
obj_ch5_LW07_slash_Step_0_gml_785_0: * Can't beat the classic Susie, right, Kris?
obj_ch5_LW07_slash_Step_0_gml_787_0: * Yes, me too! Now, don't forget your accessory!!
obj_ch5_LW07_slash_Step_0_gml_848_0: * It doubles as a cookie. If you get hungry.
obj_ch5_LW07_slash_Step_0_gml_850_0: * Heh, well, I'll try not to eat it right away.
obj_ch5_LW07_slash_Step_0_gml_887_0: * Alright, think I'm... good as I'm gonna be, I guess.
obj_ch5_LW07_slash_Step_0_gml_905_0: * Thanks, guys! I'll put it back on before I leave!
obj_ch5_LW07_slash_Step_0_gml_91_0: * It Says I'm Very Tall And Beautiful
obj_ch5_LW07_slash_Step_0_gml_992_0: * Don't worry, Susie! From what I know of "Noelle..."
obj_ch5_LW07_slash_Step_0_gml_993_0: * She's probably just as excited and preparing as you!
obj_ch5_LW07_slash_Step_0_gml_995_0: * ... yeah. She... asked me in the first place, right?
obj_ch5_LW07_slash_Step_0_gml_997_0: * Yes-a-mundo! I bet she's trimming her dewclaws right now!
obj_ch5_LW07_slash_Step_0_gml_998_0: * Rasping her eyelashes... gathering you beetles... and more!

obj_ch5_LW09_slash_Step_0_gml_153_0: * Have a wonderful day today, you two!
obj_ch5_LW09_slash_Step_0_gml_178_0: * Make sure to ride lots of rides, have lots of treats...
obj_ch5_LW09_slash_Step_0_gml_198_0: * And don't forget to eat your costume!
obj_ch5_LW09_slash_Step_0_gml_37_0: * Ready, Kris? We probably won't be coming back here today...
obj_ch5_LW10_slash_Step_0_gml_116_0: * My outfit... uhh... only works in the Dark World, huh.
obj_ch5_LW11A_slash_Step_0_gml_142_0: * H-huh!? Th... thanks! You... you look nice, too...!
obj_ch5_LW11A_slash_Step_0_gml_189_0: * You, just, um, have some trash in your hair.
obj_ch5_LW11A_slash_Step_0_gml_191_0: * Hey, just thought I'd dress up a bit for once.
obj_ch5_LW11A_slash_Step_0_gml_232_0: (Aww, that's just so Susie I can't stand it...!)
obj_ch5_LW11A_slash_Step_0_gml_233_0: (Obviously it wouldn't work in the Light World...)
obj_ch5_LW11A_slash_Step_0_gml_260_0: * ... so... what do you want to do first?
obj_ch5_LW11A_slash_Step_0_gml_344_0: * Umm, yeah! Kris, be our tour guide!
obj_ch5_LW11A_slash_Step_0_gml_345_0: * (It IS kinda easier having Kris here after all...)
obj_ch5_LW11_slash_Step_0_gml_28_0: * Oh yeah, Kris... uhh... I was thinking, y'know.
obj_ch5_LW11_slash_Step_0_gml_29_0: * If things go well today, we might have another shot at getting...
obj_ch5_LW11_slash_Step_0_gml_31_0: * And if we do that, we can try get the code again.
obj_ch5_LW11_slash_Step_0_gml_32_0: * So don't worry. It's all part of the plan, y'know?
obj_ch5_LW11_slash_Step_0_gml_34_0: * Help me make sure everything goes good.
obj_ch5_LW20W_handoff_slash_Create_0_gml: * Just like all the other times.
* Kris, you're the one that wanted this, aren't you?
* Stop pretending you're still the old Kris.
* You can't even say "stop" like you used to.
* The water's... nice, isn't it, Kris?
* Haha... it's... colder than I thought.
* Kris, don't let go of my hands.
* (Kris, you can still hear me, can't you!?)
obj_ch5_LW20W_handoff_slash_Step_0_gml_2:
* I had simply^2
gotten carried away.
obj_ch5_LW20W_slash_Step_0_gml_1143_0:
* I had simply^2
gotten carried away.
obj_ch5_LW20W_slash_Step_0_gml_150_0: * (I know you wanted to deny it.)
obj_ch5_LW20W_slash_Step_0_gml_153_0: * (We're going to have to face the truth.)
obj_ch5_LW20W_slash_Step_0_gml_169_0: * (Every cell in my body was screaming at me to run away.)
obj_ch5_LW20W_slash_Step_0_gml_170_0: * (... that if I stayed by your side any longer,)
obj_ch5_LW20W_slash_Step_0_gml_171_0: * (You were going to drag me down with you.)
obj_ch5_LW20W_slash_Step_0_gml_172_0: * (Drag me down somewhere no one is supposed to go.)
obj_ch5_LW20W_slash_Step_0_gml_174_0: * (And you know what terrified me the most about that?)
obj_ch5_LW20W_slash_Step_0_gml_261_0: * All I've been doing has just been...
obj_ch5_LW20W_slash_Step_0_gml_313_0: * It feels like... I've just been watching myself through glass.
obj_ch5_LW20W_slash_Step_0_gml_328_0: * Watching someone else move me through my life.
obj_ch5_LW20W_slash_Step_0_gml_345_0: * That's why I want... to do something crazy.
obj_ch5_LW20W_slash_Step_0_gml_361_0: * That's why I want... to break free.
obj_ch5_LW20W_slash_Step_0_gml_380_0: * A Noelle that has to do Noelle things.
obj_ch5_LW20W_slash_Step_0_gml_401_0: * Just like Kris has to do Kris things...
obj_ch5_LW20W_slash_Step_0_gml_431_0: * You found out how to stop being Kris!
obj_ch5_LW20W_slash_Step_0_gml_432_0: * And no one else has noticed...
obj_ch5_LW20W_slash_Step_0_gml_456_0: * They don't want to see how INTERESTING you are now!
obj_ch5_LW20W_slash_Step_0_gml_457_0: * They'll just keep marching down the same path...
obj_ch5_LW20W_slash_Step_0_gml_458_0: * Without even thinking where it goes!
obj_ch5_LW20W_slash_Step_0_gml_519_0: * I felt stronger than I have in my entire life.
obj_ch5_LW20W_slash_Step_0_gml_532_0: * I know... it's horrible. It's horrible to say that, but...
obj_ch5_LW20W_slash_Step_0_gml_548_0: * You... if it's you telling me to, I can do anything.
obj_ch5_LW20W_slash_Step_0_gml_549_0: * If you tell me to, I can do things that are impossible.
obj_ch5_LW20W_slash_Step_0_gml_550_0: * Things no one else can do.
obj_ch5_LW20W_slash_Step_0_gml_565_0: * So, why don't we do it?
obj_ch5_LW20W_slash_Step_0_gml_597_0: * And let's fly out of this stupid town!
obj_ch5_LW20W_slash_Step_0_gml_598_0: * To somewhere no one has ever been before!
obj_ch5_LW20W_slash_Step_0_gml_638_0: * The other side of the lake.
obj_ch5_LW20W_slash_Step_0_gml_639_0: * We always wanted to see what was there, didn't we?
obj_ch5_LW20W_slash_Step_0_gml_640_0: * The four of us, when we were kids...
obj_ch5_LW20W_slash_Step_0_gml_651_0: * If you tell me to, I can do anything.
obj_ch5_LW20W_slash_Step_0_gml_693_0: * The words... I've been waiting to hear.
obj_ch5_LW20W_slash_Step_0_gml_737_0: * Just like all the other times.
obj_ch5_LW20W_slash_Step_0_gml_749_0: * Kris, you're the one that wanted this, aren't you?
obj_ch5_LW20W_slash_Step_0_gml_754_0: * Stop pretending you're still the old Kris.
obj_ch5_LW20W_slash_Step_0_gml_755_0: * You can't even say "stop" like you used to.
obj_ch5_LW20W_slash_Step_0_gml_833_0: * The water's... nice, isn't it, Kris?
obj_ch5_LW20W_slash_Step_0_gml_847_0: * Haha... it's... colder than I thought.
obj_ch5_LW20W_slash_Step_0_gml_854_0: * Kris, don't let go of my hands.
obj_ch5_LW20W_slash_Step_0_gml_976_0: * (Kris, you can still hear me, can't you!?)
obj_ch5_LW20_slash_Step_0_gml_1031_0: * You have so much going on... I could...
obj_ch5_LW20_slash_Step_0_gml_1032_0: * I could never do what you do.
obj_ch5_LW20_slash_Step_0_gml_1033_0: * I mean, the only reason I'm here now, is 'cause...
obj_ch5_LW20_slash_Step_0_gml_1056_0: * If, being here can be like this...
obj_ch5_LW20_slash_Step_0_gml_1057_0: * I... don't want to run away anymore.
obj_ch5_LW20_slash_Step_0_gml_1061_0: * I want to make it like this, for you.
obj_ch5_LW20_slash_Step_0_gml_1094_0: * Okay, faha! We can go back!
obj_ch5_LW20_slash_Step_0_gml_1134_0: * Just wanted to see if I could make your heart beat any faster.\f1
obj_ch5_LW20_slash_Step_0_gml_123_0: * Fahaha! When did you say you made up that song?
obj_ch5_LW20_slash_Step_0_gml_1242_0: * No... no, I can't go over there right now.
obj_ch5_LW20_slash_Step_0_gml_1243_0: * I'm with Susie. And, I don't know if you get it, but...
obj_ch5_LW20_slash_Step_0_gml_1248_0: * So... I can't talk right now, okay?
obj_ch5_LW20_slash_Step_0_gml_1277_0: * ... you, uh... really like me, huh?
obj_ch5_LW20_slash_Step_0_gml_1330_0: * Whatever way you meant you like me, I like you too.
obj_ch5_LW20_slash_Step_0_gml_1334_0: * Makes 'em... some of the best days I can have.
obj_ch5_LW20_slash_Step_0_gml_1367_0: * I really really REALLY like you.
obj_ch5_LW20_slash_Step_0_gml_1368_0: * And I have... for a long time.
obj_ch5_LW20_slash_Step_0_gml_1381_0: * Like, even when I was a jerk!?
obj_ch5_LW20_slash_Step_0_gml_1412_0: * ... just makes me like you more.
obj_ch5_LW20_slash_Step_0_gml_1415_0: * Actually, there's... something I really want to tell you.
obj_ch5_LW20_slash_Step_0_gml_1435_0: * But, uhh, could I get some more ice cream, first?
obj_ch5_LW20_slash_Step_0_gml_1484_0: * I almost thought I might pass out for a second...
obj_ch5_LW20_slash_Step_0_gml_1515_0: * Faha, I forgot you were... umm, still here!
obj_ch5_LW20_slash_Step_0_gml_1516_0: * How much of that, did you, um, hear...?
obj_ch5_LW20_slash_Step_0_gml_1540_0: * Listen, I TOLD you not to call me anymore!!
obj_ch5_LW20_slash_Step_0_gml_1608_0: * Phew... wasn't even sure if you were alive for a sec.
obj_ch5_LW20_slash_Step_0_gml_1609_0: * Me and Noelle... uhh, we kind of ended up, uh...
obj_ch5_LW20_slash_Step_0_gml_1612_0: * I went to get some ice cream for her, and she's just...
obj_ch5_LW20_slash_Step_0_gml_1614_0: * I wanna go look for her, but I...
obj_ch5_LW20_slash_Step_0_gml_1615_0: * I dunno, you don't need to be here alone, right?
obj_ch5_LW20_slash_Step_0_gml_1634_0: * Obviously we need to go Zorgon mode.
obj_ch5_LW20_slash_Step_0_gml_1646_0: * Nah, not yet. You don't have enough practice.
obj_ch5_LW20_slash_Step_0_gml_1647_0: * Let's go up and down the beach.
obj_ch5_LW20_slash_Step_0_gml_165_0: * O French fry on the floor... it's you that I adore...
obj_ch5_LW20_slash_Step_0_gml_1660_0: * You don't need it again, dumbass!
obj_ch5_LW20_slash_Step_0_gml_1668_0: * I dunno why, but I was...
obj_ch5_LW20_slash_Step_0_gml_166_0: * Greasy and salty and lots lots... more?
obj_ch5_LW20_slash_Step_0_gml_1670_0: * You were both acting kinda weird and...
obj_ch5_LW20_slash_Step_0_gml_1672_0: * ... I probably said something weird again, heh.
obj_ch5_LW20_slash_Step_0_gml_1690_0: * He... he fell down? At the Festival?
obj_ch5_LW20_slash_Step_0_gml_1691_0: * ... n-no, you're joking, right? He's just...
obj_ch5_LW20_slash_Step_0_gml_1721_0: * Just... tell Susie I REALLY wanted to talk to her, but...
obj_ch5_LW20_slash_Step_0_gml_1722_0: * I just... I just had to...
obj_ch5_LW20_slash_Step_0_gml_1768_0: * Hey, Noelle!! You here!? They had to make more mint!!
obj_ch5_LW20_slash_Step_0_gml_1798_0: * Hey Kris, wake the hell up!
obj_ch5_LW20_slash_Step_0_gml_1819_0: * Hahahaha!! Dude, you look like a pineapple!
obj_ch5_LW20_slash_Step_0_gml_1845_0: * What? She had to... go somewhere?
obj_ch5_LW20_slash_Step_0_gml_1847_0: * So what, dumbass? That just means we gotta follow her, right?
obj_ch5_LW20_slash_Step_0_gml_190_0: * Hahahah! Dude, you could be like, a pro music guy!
obj_ch5_LW20_slash_Step_0_gml_192_0: * Ha, um... it's never really been my talent.
obj_ch5_LW20_slash_Step_0_gml_194_0: * Really? 'Cause even when it's dumb stuff, your singing's...
obj_ch5_LW20_slash_Step_0_gml_235_0: * ... probably one of the best days ever.
obj_ch5_LW20_slash_Step_0_gml_296_0: * ... kinda sucks it's almost over, huh?
obj_ch5_LW20_slash_Step_0_gml_300_0: * How long have we been talking?
obj_ch5_LW20_slash_Step_0_gml_304_0: * ... gosh, should we wake up Kris...?
obj_ch5_LW20_slash_Step_0_gml_339_0: * Well, just the two of us is cool sometimes, too.
obj_ch5_LW20_slash_Step_0_gml_387_0: * I know she's gonna ask if I'm with you...
obj_ch5_LW20_slash_Step_0_gml_391_0: * But I guess... I can't not answer it...
obj_ch5_LW20_slash_Step_0_gml_416_0: * 'less you lost your phone again, right?
obj_ch5_LW20_slash_Step_0_gml_439_0: * Then you'd have to keep hanging out.
obj_ch5_LW20_slash_Step_0_gml_467_0: * Uh... I didn't hurt your phone though, right?
obj_ch5_LW20_slash_Step_0_gml_541_0: * Here. The honors of your phone.
obj_ch5_LW20_slash_Step_0_gml_555_0: * Aww, with the sunset and everything...
obj_ch5_LW20_slash_Step_0_gml_578_0: * ... Susie, would you... wanna watch it?
obj_ch5_LW20_slash_Step_0_gml_580_0: * The horror compilation on your phone?
obj_ch5_LW20_slash_Step_0_gml_658_0: * ... probably one of the best days ever.
obj_ch5_LW20_slash_Step_0_gml_660_0: * Faha! Susie, you just said that exact same thing.
obj_ch5_LW20_slash_Step_0_gml_662_0: * Yeah, but I just... keep thinking it over and over.
obj_ch5_LW20_slash_Step_0_gml_696_0: * S... Susie!? What are you doing!? Faha!
obj_ch5_LW20_slash_Step_0_gml_700_0: * But... but your shoes... aren't they gonna get...
obj_ch5_LW20_slash_Step_0_gml_703_0: * Don't you wanna do something crazy?
obj_ch5_LW20_slash_Step_0_gml_755_0: * Then c'mon. Let's take the first step.
obj_ch5_LW20_slash_Step_0_gml_794_0: * Umm, I could go get my swimming suit really fast...
obj_ch5_LW20_slash_Step_0_gml_848_0: * What, want me to put you down?
obj_ch5_LW20_slash_Step_0_gml_870_0: * Well, you gotta hold on tight, then.
obj_ch5_LW20_slash_Step_0_gml_889_0: * I thought it was one of the best days ever...
obj_ch5_LW20_slash_Step_0_gml_890_0: * But, I guess it's still getting better.
obj_ch5_LW20_slash_Step_0_gml_930_0: * Sorry... I was... listening to your heart beating.
obj_ch5_LW20_slash_Step_0_gml_932_0: * Heh... I can feel yours... too.
obj_ch5_LW20_slash_Step_0_gml_948_0: * ... they're going to crown the Festival King and Queen.
obj_ch5_LW20_slash_Step_0_gml_962_0: * Actually... can I say something weird?
obj_ch5_LW20_slash_Step_0_gml_968_0: * What would happen... if I left.
obj_ch5_LW20_slash_Step_0_gml_986_0: * ... you mean, like ran away from home...?
obj_ch5_LW20_slash_Step_0_gml_989_0: * But, I'm too weak to do that.
obj_ch5_LW21_arrive_slash_Step_0_gml_172: * ... Kris? Hey, c'mon! We gotta get going!
obj_ch5_LW21_slash_Step_0_gml_338_0: * Hey, Kris, I got these for Noelle, but...
obj_ch5_LW21_slash_Step_0_gml_355_0: * You... uh, think she'd like them...?
obj_ch5_LW21_slash_Step_0_gml_365_0: * Kris, you think it'll work out between us?
obj_ch5_LW21_slash_Step_0_gml_407_0: * ... yeah, I... maybe flowers are... stupid, right?
obj_ch5_LW21_slash_Step_0_gml_494_0: * Kris! Kris, hey, Kris! The hell are you!?
obj_ch5_LW21_slash_Step_0_gml_510_0: * Kris... it's... it's a Dark World!
obj_ch5_LW21_slash_Step_0_gml_511_0: * Your... your dad's in there! Hurry!
obj_ch5_LW21_slash_Step_0_gml_58_0: * ... hey, Kris. Mind if I stop in here a sec?
obj_ch5_LWF01_slash_Step_0_gml_154_0: * Kris, stay here! I'm... gonna find something to help!
obj_ch5_LWF01_slash_Step_0_gml_259_0: * (It's a broken container for a golden flower.)
obj_ch5_LWF01_slash_Step_0_gml_262_0: * (One, a packet of seeds, from the golden flower.)
obj_ch5_LWF01_slash_Step_0_gml_263_0: * (... they are covered in warning labels.)
obj_ch5_LWF01_slash_Step_0_gml_265_0: * (The second thing was a piece of paper.)
obj_ch5_LWF01_slash_Step_0_gml_266_0: * (On the piece of paper was a code...)
obj_ch5_LWF01_slash_Step_0_gml_280_0: * (And with both hands, began to tear it to%%
obj_ch5_LWF01_slash_Step_0_gml_310_0: * Hey, I got tape! Help him out a sec!
obj_ch5_LWF01_slash_Step_0_gml_356_0: * It's a bit ripped, but I can still read it...!
obj_ch5_LWF01_slash_Step_0_gml_378_0: * ... hey, don't just stand there, tape him up!
obj_ch5_LWF01_slash_Step_0_gml_413_0: * Sorry guys, you're gonna have to share for now...
obj_ch5_LWF01_slash_Step_0_gml_425_0: * Before we sealed the first Fountain... Flowery talked to me.
obj_ch5_LWF01_slash_Step_0_gml_426_0: * ... and told me that Asgore used to be the police chief...
obj_ch5_LWF01_slash_Step_0_gml_427_0: * And still had his shelter code buried in Flowery's soil!
obj_ch5_LWF01_slash_Step_0_gml_428_0: * He... told me not to tell anybody about it, but...
obj_ch5_LWF01_slash_Step_0_gml_429_0: * ... guess he told you, too, huh?
obj_ch5_LWF01_slash_Step_0_gml_430_0: * ... anyway, let's get out of here. Fast.
obj_ch5_LWF01_slash_Step_0_gml_527_0: * (On top of it is an anime-style comic.)
obj_ch5_LWF01_slash_Step_0_gml_551_0: * (Papers. Looking closely, it's not just receipts.)
obj_ch5_LWF01_slash_Step_0_gml_552_0: * (... but you never liked looking closely.)
obj_ch5_LWF01_slash_Step_0_gml_562_0: * (It's too dark to read in more detail.)
obj_ch5_LWF02_slash_Step_0_gml_150_0: * I know this, probably isn't good timing.
obj_ch5_LWF02_slash_Step_0_gml_151_0: * Maybe, it's actually the worst timing, but...
obj_ch5_LWF02_slash_Step_0_gml_174_0: * Would you mind walking me home?
obj_ch5_LWF02_slash_Step_0_gml_175_0: * There's... something I want to talk to you about.
obj_ch5_LWF02_slash_Step_0_gml_197_0:
I have

\m2	(K_K is short for Cakes.)
obj_shop_ch2_music_slash_Draw_0_gml_548_:
*She made music against the law.
\m2	Unless you make a song she likes.
\m3	But the only JUNK she enjoys...
obj_shop_ch2_music_slash_Draw_0_gml_549_:
*Are reverse diss-tracks, where
	the vocalist puts themselves
	down, and praises Queen...
\m3	Or noise music.
obj_shop_ch2_music_slash_Draw_0_gml_550_:
*But even if Queenie tries to put
	a limiter on us...
obj_shop_ch2_music_slash_Draw_0_gml_551_:
*You can't STOP ! THE ! MUSIC!
\m3	Hear that!? We'll just go
	underground!!
\m2	Crash! Boom! Bang!
obj_shop_ch2_music_slash_Draw_0_gml_552_:
*That's why we made this junk
	shop!
\m3	We'll fund our musical rebellion!
\m2	Can we make noise music, too?
obj_shop_ch2_music_slash_Draw_0_gml_565_:
*What, wanna see what we got!?
\m3	Yo, yo, can you handle this!?
\m2	Hold onto your antennas!!
obj_shop_ch2_music_slash_Draw_0_gml_571_:
*Queen wasn't always so... harsh.
\m3	No, she WAS! She just got WORSE
	somehow!
obj_shop_ch2_music_slash_Draw_0_gml_572_:
*It wasn't 'til that DARK FOUNTAIN
	showed up,
\m3	That she started going into
	overdrive.
obj_shop_ch2_music_slash_Draw_0_gml_573_:
*"Knight" this, "Knight" that,
	"Fountain" that...
\m3	Like, what does that Knight
	even have going for it that I
	don't!? C'mon!!
obj_shop_ch2_music_slash_Draw_0_gml_574_:
*But like I said. She wasn't
	ALWAYS so bad. She used to
	give me sweets. For being so
	sweet!
\m3	H... huh!? I never got candy!!
obj_shop_ch2_music_slash_Draw_0_gml_575_:
*You kept calling her a
	"hot mama," Cap.
\m3	Yeah!? Is that wrong!? She
	looks like a mom and tends to
	overheat!!
obj_shop_ch2_music_slash_Draw_0_gml_576_:
*K_K! Help me out here!!
\m1	K_K! What do you think?
\m2	Huh? Me?
obj_shop_ch2_music_slash_Draw_0_gml_578_:
*Yeah, you're right, K_K! We gotta
	focus on what's important!
\m3	If the band fights, we'll get
	outta tune!
\m2	Anyone have any lemon drops?
obj_shop_ch2_music_slash_Draw_0_gml_584_:
*Our main gig is making scrap
	into machines.
\m3	Our clients are sometimes a
	bit off-key though.
\m2	They smell off-key too!!
obj_shop_ch2_music_slash_Draw_0_gml_585_:

	Queen's mansion...

	wanna get in trouble!
obj_shop_ch2_music_slash_Draw_0_gml_586_:

	real-high-class-client.

	with words!!
\m2	I couldn't even understand him!
obj_shop_ch2_music_slash_Draw_0_gml_587_:

	apart!! Big time!!
obj_shop_ch2_music_slash_Draw_0_gml_616_:

\m2	All our songs are only 4 seconds

obj_shop_ch5_slash_Create_0_gml_180_0:
* The sunset...
* It's breathtaking,
isn't it?
obj_shop_ch5_slash_Create_0_gml_183_0:
* The sunset... will
it ever be this
beautiful again?
obj_shop_ch5_slash_Create_0_gml_186_0:
* That's right, go outside.
* It's beautiful.
obj_shop_ch5_slash_Create_0_gml_209_0: * I've never seen a sunset so breathtaking...
obj_shop_ch5_slash_Create_0_gml_210_0: * Tell me, was everything always this beautiful?
obj_shop_ch5_slash_Create_0_gml_215_0: * Where I came from, the colors were bleak.
obj_shop_ch5_slash_Create_0_gml_216_0: * It was like looking at the world through a napkin.
obj_shop_ch5_slash_Create_0_gml_217_0: * Here, the sunset shines from the back of your eyes, like the afterglow of a light you stared at too long.
obj_shop_ch5_slash_Create_0_gml_227_0: * Right, of course, I'm also human. That's why I look and feel like a flower.
obj_shop_ch5_slash_Create_0_gml_229_0: * I suppose... it depends on the color of the sunset.
obj_shop_ch5_slash_Create_0_gml_233_0: * Names, names, names! That's what everyone always thinks about.
obj_shop_ch5_slash_Create_0_gml_235_0: * ... well, it's your body, isn't it?
obj_shop_ch5_slash_Create_0_gml_240_0: * Listen, have you had ears before? Cute and fluffy ears?
obj_shop_ch5_slash_Create_0_gml_244_0: * ... not like you, long ears. Those seem like a fire hazard.
obj_shop_ch5_slash_Create_0_gml_245_0: * ... especially you, purpleface. How do you even hear?
obj_shop_ch5_slash_Create_0_gml_246_0: * Yes, you're nodding. Obviously you agree. Obviously.
obj_shop_ch5_slash_Create_0_gml_258_0: * Asgore... he seems happy. You should be happy for him, too.
obj_shop_ch5_slash_Create_0_gml_259_0: * Me? I've... never been able to talk to him. For... obvious reasons.
obj_shop_ch5_slash_Create_0_gml_260_0: * I know. It's selfish, if you say it out loud. Everything... has been thanks to him.
obj_shop_ch5_slash_Create_0_gml_261_0: * Until now, I... I couldn't really think about that.
obj_shop_ch5_slash_Create_0_gml_263_0: * I can think now, though. I'll do my best to fit in and help, too.
obj_shop_ch5_slash_Create_0_gml_267_0: * Up until now, I don't think I realized what loneliness was.
obj_shop_ch5_slash_Create_0_gml_268_0: * Now, looking at the sunrise, I finally noticed it. That pang in my heart...
obj_shop_ch5_slash_Create_0_gml_269_0: * ... I'm going to make friends here. I know it. Lots and lots of friends...
obj_shop_ch5_slash_Create_0_gml_278_0: * I guess... I'll be "graduating" from here soon.
obj_shop_ch5_slash_Create_0_gml_279_0: * I... I'm not just ready to leave my friends behind yet...
obj_shop_ch5_slash_Create_0_gml_280_0: * But, is that something... anyone is ever ready for?
obj_shop_ch5_slash_Create_0_gml_284_0: * If you "seal the Fountain"... I won't stick around.
obj_shop_ch5_slash_Create_0_gml_285_0: * I'll... need some time to myself, I think.
obj_shop_ch5_slash_Create_0_gml_286_0: * But, I'll be meeting you again.
obj_shop_ch5_slash_Create_0_gml_287_0: * And Ory, I'll be making sure Asgore is watering you properly, OK!?

obj_town_mid_ferris_slash_Step_0_gml_305: * ... all this time, I thought you were teasing me, but...

* (Head Hathy drinks an ice tea in silence...)
An aggressive antivirus. It's not down with the sickness.
* Pipooo! Nothing beats a nice shot of espresso... want me to give you a "shot", too!?
Known to say ASOBOH, which means "Let's Play!" ... does it know that?
It was controlled by Queen. But, it's stronger and cooler now, so?
* (It has some kind of energy drink.)
It dreams of re-enacting scenes from cat and mouse cartoons.
A virus with a slightly criminal streak... and a heart of gold.
* Wanna share my soda? We'll both get sick that way... hee hee.
Colorful and dandy, you can always count on him to work hard.
* Boss? Shall we sit down and enjoy a nice earl grey?
It absorbed the wire with fighting spirit. Gets flustered easily.
* (... it's crushing its energy drink with its hand...)
Loves to coordinate outfits. Strongly dislikes clowns.
You recruited 3 big mice and you're stuck with it.
* (It's getting electricity from the melted cheese like a water wheel)
Said to be someone's best friend, but maybe not. Shine on, you lazy diamond!
Passionate about music, but often taken advantage of by sinister types.
* (Seems to just be enjoying the musical ambience.)
Don't scream...! It's not the real monster, just the Darkner. Ooo la la.
* Shush! Don't do the move... I am photographing the drink!
A bouncer that favors brute force over beauty. Gets lost easily.
* Say da word, boss... I'll give dis drink a sip it won't forget.
A real dust... frog. Known to play dirty, but loves to play... dirty.
* (Looks like it want to be dabbed with rubbing alcohol.)
The chatty office star. Obviously quite a looker despite her prudish wear.

* (Seems like they're drinking water.)
* (... feels questionable.)
* Hey, boss! I'll have a Dark Candy Starfait!
A sly customer that takes risk until luck strikes. ... cheating also works.
* This drink's not mine? It's fine. I'm just keeping it warm.
The weather girl who really "makes it rain." Like... with water, though.
* Oh no, where's Lanino? He better not be having a team relationship...
A charming weatherman who can control the weather. Which, seems like cheating.
* Haven't been on a date alone for a while! ... which, isn't a date.
A waxy spirit that generates ghastly flames. Though, not a "real" ghost per se, it has an aversion to whips, water, and the like.
* (Guei is sipping the melted wax from the ambient candles.)
An ancient aromancer, it generates magic incense and stores it in its steel shell. Easygoing, it gets along well with Guei.
A heart with a big heart. Always supporting others with her bullets.
* (It's drinking nothing but straight tea powder.)
An old sage who can't help but mumble. It is rumored that 1000 spells are kept within his beard.
The aqua fairy which slumbers in the "Water Cooler". Arbitrarily does fairy-like or princess-like things (as she pleases).
* Oh, is this tapwater? Ho hum...
The witch's familiar, a living sword. Its greatest delight is being asked to carve graffiti.
* (It's carved your initials in the table...)
A witch who engages in musical rituals. Each song she plays is a magical charm that can change one's mood... though, isn't that all music?
* (She's musically striking the side of the cup with a spoon.)
A philosopher who studies the ancient words. Their light-blocking mask is said to let them commune deeper with the truth of the dark.
* (Hathy is going to order a heart-foam latte.)
* Am I 1`% tea, or has it become 99`% me?
A regular "Mizzle" who, after ages of worship, falsely believes herself to be of great royalty. Isn't even "HOLY" elemental.
* Oh, young hero. I beseeth thee; where is the VIP Chamber?
A simple organism that takes life one square at a time.
Looks like Rudinn, but stronger and better. It thinks it's a flower and probably so does everyone else. Idolizes Flowery and Green.
It blows carefree on the wind... until the wind stops blowing. Idolizes Aqua.
An immobile scarecrow who yells out the names of his special super hero attacks. He believes they are famous, but only Kawkaw is a fan. Idolizes Yellow and Orange.
Seth's disciple. Instructed by Seth to be a master of Ninjutsu, but... watching Seth, just became a nerd.
A conical crow which lives in the ground. Disturbs Shi's crops, only because it wants to play with him.
* (Looks like it wants to osmose some flavorful cubes.)
A familiar dancer with sharp legs. Only fights when provoked. Idolizes Blue.
A tricky fox...? Supposed to watch Orange, but Orange doesn't like Netskies. Gets along with Aqua.
An ancient armor that lives to protect nature. Fears Green as some kind of nature spirit.
A real dust bunny. Known to play dirty, but loves to play clean.
* (Looks like it wants to be dabbed with rubbing alcohol.)
A shape changing fighter. Ironically, blocking is not its forte.
* Everything tastes better with a normally-shaped body!
scr_resolve_documents_text_slash_scr_res: * This time it says something... about...
* ... black... shards.
* You mean... that piece of the...
* ... the Knight's sword?
* How would he know about the...
* Huh? What's a black shard?
* ... why didn't I know about this?
* I... think it's...
* ... it's a piece of the Knight's... sword?
* Huh?
* It was left... at the... original scene...
* Wouldn't it be... important...?
* And... matched with... the...
* And... computer lab?
* H-huh? So wait, that Dark World from a long time ago...
* And Cyber World... they were both...
* ... made by the Knight?
* How long has the Knight been making fountains?
* Making people disappear...?
* I... don't know. This doesn't make sense.
* The Knight... I thought they only showed up...
* ... alongside the heroes... right?
* (Kris... did something... happen all that time ago?)
* (And that's... what made your dad... end up like that?)
* (If you look closely, the wallpaper resembles your father's handwriting...)
* (But, the letters are all tangled up.)
* These old documents... Kris, did your dad write these...?
* (A pile of documents...)
* ... but, wait... the text is all messed up.
* Ralsei, think you can figure it out?
* I suppose I could... try.
* If I can... just concentrate...
* On where the letters are supposed to be, then...
* Ugh, I can't get it!
* Something about...
* Something about... the Dark World.
* Huh? ... wait, I don't get it. Why would your dad...
* Have notes about the Dark World, if he just got here?
* No, Susie, it's about...
* ... it's something about...
* A Dark World... a long time ago?
* H... huh? Wait, why would there be...
* (How long... has the Dark World... existed...?)
* It's another document written by Asgore... from... a day ago?

It's not magic, is it?
No, not something like this.
scr_spellinfo_slash_scr_spellinfo_gml_99:
A cold mist sweeps through,
sparing all TIRED enemies.
scr_spelltext_slash_scr_spelltext_gml_33:
* ~1 cast PACIFY!
* But the enemy wasn't \cBTIRED\cW...
scr_spelltext_slash_scr_spelltext_gml_36:
* ~1 cast PACIFY!
* But the foe wasn't \cBTIRED\cW... try \cYSPARING\cW!
scr_text_slash_scr_text_gml_1001_0:
* Ooo, how's Catti doing?
* I have no idea.
scr_text_slash_scr_text_gml_1002_0: * We, like, totally can't connect at all!
scr_text_slash_scr_text_gml_1003_0: * Yesterday, I asked if she wanted to hear me play the ukelele...
scr_text_slash_scr_text_gml_1004_0:
* She said no!
* And then she, like, told me...
scr_text_slash_scr_text_gml_1005_0: * My playing is "an anti-blessing from Planet Hell."
scr_text_slash_scr_text_gml_1007_0:
* That's SOOO cute!
* I love my fricked-up lil sis!
scr_text_slash_scr_text_gml_1011_0:
* Oh, you gotta go?
* Do you have, like, homework...?
scr_text_slash_scr_text_gml_1012_0: * You should, like, let me help!
scr_text_slash_scr_text_gml_1013_0:
* Hahaha, JK!
* I totally don't want to! Laters!
scr_text_slash_scr_text_gml_1022_0:
* Krissy!
* Like, long time no see!
scr_text_slash_scr_text_gml_1023_0:
* What's up?
* Did you wanna talk about something?
scr_text_slash_scr_text_gml_1030_0: * Ugh, that chick next door drives me NUTS.
scr_text_slash_scr_text_gml_1031_0:
* I keep seeing her EVERYWHERE I go.
* She's a TOTAL copycat.
scr_text_slash_scr_text_gml_1032_0:
* Like, WHY though?
* Doesn't she realize she'll NEVER be me?
scr_text_slash_scr_text_gml_1033_0: * Honestly, her whole family is, like, SO trashy.
scr_text_slash_scr_text_gml_1034_0: * Once her sister served me a coffee and I swear it was half cat fur.
scr_text_slash_scr_text_gml_1035_0: * Like, get a hairnet, girl. For, like, your whole body.
scr_text_slash_scr_text_gml_1040_0: * Remember that time you wanted to hang out with us big kids?
scr_text_slash_scr_text_gml_1041_0: * I was like, "yeah, of course! Just get us some burgers!"
scr_text_slash_scr_text_gml_1042_0:
* Then, like, amazingly...
* You ACTUALLY got them...
scr_text_slash_scr_text_gml_1043_0: * So I told you to go back and get some french fries, too...
scr_text_slash_scr_text_gml_1045_0: * They were SO good, I ate like six!
scr_text_slash_scr_text_gml_1046_0:
* Then I like...
* Suddenly got so sick I had to go home.
scr_text_slash_scr_text_gml_1048_0:
* So, like, anyway...
* Kris, are you busy?
scr_text_slash_scr_text_gml_1053_0: * Aww, that's no way to talk to your almost-sister-in-law.
scr_text_slash_scr_text_gml_1055_0: * Remember that time I played truth or dare with Azzy?
scr_text_slash_scr_text_gml_1056_0: * I, like, made him give me his first kiss...
scr_text_slash_scr_text_gml_1057_0: * Then your mom found out he kissed someone, and...
scr_text_slash_scr_text_gml_1058_0: * Like, I think she basically dialed 911.
scr_text_slash_scr_text_gml_1059_0: * I swear your family went to church, like...
scr_text_slash_scr_text_gml_1064_0: * Aw, Krissy, you just wanted to say hi?
scr_text_slash_scr_text_gml_1065_0:
* That's adorable...
* Now get out of here.
scr_text_slash_scr_text_gml_1098_0:
* Heheh...
* Just hand over the money, and...
scr_text_slash_scr_text_gml_1102_0:
* You're just like us.
* An' people like us gotta help each other out.
scr_text_slash_scr_text_gml_11096_0: * Keeping in mind this is just for fun...
scr_text_slash_scr_text_gml_11097_0: * Time your notes well to get \cYGOLD NOTES\cW.
scr_text_slash_scr_text_gml_11098_0: * Well, there might be some lag... just adjust on the fly.
scr_text_slash_scr_text_gml_11100_0: * But you can press ~1 or ~2 to play the notes, too. Or mix-and-match!
scr_text_slash_scr_text_gml_11101_0: * Made a mistake? Quit or restart by pressing ~1!
scr_text_slash_scr_text_gml_1111_0:
* HA! HA! Did I say FIFTY!?
* Well, we just went on sale!
* TWENTY! TWENTY Dark Dollars!
scr_text_slash_scr_text_gml_1138_0:
* Heheh...
* Just hand over the money, and...
scr_text_slash_scr_text_gml_1142_0:
* You're just like us.
* An' people like us gotta help each other out.
scr_text_slash_scr_text_gml_1151_0:
* ONE!!! ONLY ONE DOLLAR!!!
* PLEASE!!! PLEASE!!!
* I NEED THIS RIGHT NOW!!!
scr_text_slash_scr_text_gml_1174_0:
* Heheh...
* Just hand over the money, and...
scr_text_slash_scr_text_gml_1178_0:
* You're just like us.
* An' people like us gotta help each other out.
scr_text_slash_scr_text_gml_1188_0:
* Er, excuse me, Sir.
* I think I have a dollar.
scr_text_slash_scr_text_gml_1194_0:
* Heheh, perfect!
* Right this way, gentleners!
scr_text_slash_scr_text_gml_1207_0:
* I'm TP Master.
* Ask me about TP's.
scr_text_slash_scr_text_gml_1215_0:
* TP? What's TP?
* That's what lets you cast SPELLS, see!?
scr_text_slash_scr_text_gml_1216_0:
* When you see that orange bar,
* Cast some SPELLS when it's filled up far.
scr_text_slash_scr_text_gml_1217_0:
* TP...! It's quite a caper!
* TP! Stands for...
* ... Toilet Paper!
scr_text_slash_scr_text_gml_1219_0: * ... no, it stands for Tension Points.
scr_text_slash_scr_text_gml_1225_0:
* TP only lasts, inside a fight.
* Once you win, it's out of sight.
scr_text_slash_scr_text_gml_1226_0:
* Having extra, feels unbearable.
* No point in saving, it's straight-up terrible.
scr_text_slash_scr_text_gml_1228_0: * But leftover TP turns into extra money at the end of battle...
scr_text_slash_scr_text_gml_1230_0: * You mean I only should have been using one square!?
scr_text_slash_scr_text_gml_1234_0:
* You get TP when you DEFEND.
* Protect yourself, then cast SPELLs, friend.
scr_text_slash_scr_text_gml_1235_0: * You also get TP by getting close to bullets.
scr_text_slash_scr_text_gml_1236_0: * Look for the heart outline when you get close to bullets.
scr_text_slash_scr_text_gml_1256_0:
* I'm Ralsei Master.
* Ask me about RALSEI's.
scr_text_slash_scr_text_gml_1264_0:
* Ralsei's spell's called PACIFY.
* Use it on BABIES, before they CRY.
scr_text_slash_scr_text_gml_1266_0: * What? It safely removes a "TIRED" enemy from combat.
scr_text_slash_scr_text_gml_1268_0: * What if you're fighting a BABY!?
scr_text_slash_scr_text_gml_1273_0: * Ralsei has a spell that HEALS, dude.
scr_text_slash_scr_text_gml_1274_0: * Why use that, when you can eat FOOD?
scr_text_slash_scr_text_gml_1276_0: * Because you won't have to use up an ITEM?
scr_text_slash_scr_text_gml_1278_0: * I could have avoided all those empty calories!?
scr_text_slash_scr_text_gml_1282_0: * Ralsei loves when you give us MONEY.
scr_text_slash_scr_text_gml_1283_0: * He will hug you, and call you HONEY.
scr_text_slash_scr_text_gml_1286_0: * You don't need money to get me to do that!
scr_text_slash_scr_text_gml_1295_0:
* I'm Susie Master.
* Ask me about SUSIE's.
scr_text_slash_scr_text_gml_129_0:
* Welcome.
* I am the \cYPrince\cW of this \cYKingdom\cW...
scr_text_slash_scr_text_gml_12_0: * You really didn't want to throw it away.
scr_text_slash_scr_text_gml_1303_0:
* When KRIS uses WARNING, SUSIE can't hit.
* So make sure to -
scr_text_slash_scr_text_gml_1305_0: * So there's no reason to use it.
scr_text_slash_scr_text_gml_1307_0:
* Unless...
* Unless you wanted not to hurt -
scr_text_slash_scr_text_gml_1313_0: * Susie's gone, I'm afraid, I'm afreet.
scr_text_slash_scr_text_gml_1318_0: * The days of WARNing, have long since past.
scr_text_slash_scr_text_gml_131_0:
* Kris, Susie...
* There is a \cYLEGEND\cW in this land.
scr_text_slash_scr_text_gml_1326_0: * Susie always attacks, the foe on top.
scr_text_slash_scr_text_gml_1327_0: * She'll smash them, with a crushing chop.
scr_text_slash_scr_text_gml_1328_0: * She always strikes, at the first thing she sees...
scr_text_slash_scr_text_gml_132_0: * A LEGEND that one day, two \cYHEROES of LIGHT\cW will arrive,
scr_text_slash_scr_text_gml_1332_0:
* Oh no, oh no!
* She's looking at ME!
scr_text_slash_scr_text_gml_1337_0: * Will you two pick up the slack?
scr_text_slash_scr_text_gml_133_0: * And fulfill the ancient prophecy, foretold by time and space.
scr_text_slash_scr_text_gml_1342_0: * Susie's BUSTER, RUDE as may be...
scr_text_slash_scr_text_gml_1343_0: * Will deal more damage, if you just press [~1]!
scr_text_slash_scr_text_gml_1349_0:
* Susie loves, when you give us MONEY.
* She will -
scr_text_slash_scr_text_gml_134_0:
* Please, Heroes...
* Listen to my tale...
scr_text_slash_scr_text_gml_1357_0: * Will you two pick up the slackts?
scr_text_slash_scr_text_gml_1361_0: * SUSIE seems to have changed, just a hair.
scr_text_slash_scr_text_gml_1362_0: * That kind of growth is actually rare.
scr_text_slash_scr_text_gml_1378_0:
* I'm Kris Master.
* Ask me about KRIS's.
scr_text_slash_scr_text_gml_1386_0: * When HP goes negative, your friends fall down
scr_text_slash_scr_text_gml_1387_0: * But bringing them back, is easy-town
scr_text_slash_scr_text_gml_1388_0: * Plain foods and spells, work like a charm -
scr_text_slash_scr_text_gml_1389_0: * And with a MINT, you can cure all HARM.
scr_text_slash_scr_text_gml_1391_0: * Even normal items and spells can revive people, huh?
scr_text_slash_scr_text_gml_1398_0: * If you only ACT, you might start to think -
scr_text_slash_scr_text_gml_1399_0: * What about the guy with the scarf in pink?
scr_text_slash_scr_text_gml_1401_0: * If you know ACTing will make the enemy friendly -
scr_text_slash_scr_text_gml_1402_0: * Then you can ask me to SPARE on the SAME TURN.
scr_text_slash_scr_text_gml_1403_0: * Or, cast PACIFY if you know they'll get TIRED.
scr_text_slash_scr_text_gml_1404_0: * If you plan ahead, a lot can happen in ONE TURN!
scr_text_slash_scr_text_gml_1406_0: * Hey, who's the MASTER here, me or you!?
scr_text_slash_scr_text_gml_1410_0: * It's a good idea, to give us BUCKs.
scr_text_slash_scr_text_gml_1411_0: * It'll make you happy, and fill you with LUCKs.
scr_text_slash_scr_text_gml_1412_0: * Over there, is our DONATION HOLE.
scr_text_slash_scr_text_gml_1413_0: * We had a BOX, but it got STOLE.
scr_text_slash_scr_text_gml_1423_0: * (If you like our tutorials, please throw your money into a hole.)
scr_text_slash_scr_text_gml_1427_0: * (The hole is filled to the brim with cash.)
scr_text_slash_scr_text_gml_1442_0: * (You failed to budget enough money to throw into a hole...)
scr_text_slash_scr_text_gml_1447_0: * (You decided to save the dollar for a different hole.)
scr_text_slash_scr_text_gml_1459_0:
* We, uh, got bored.
* So we're having a snack.
scr_text_slash_scr_text_gml_1463_0: * C'mon! All I ate for breakfast was chalk!
scr_text_slash_scr_text_gml_1467_0: * Sorry. What are you two having, exactly...?
scr_text_slash_scr_text_gml_1469_0: * Just a daily treasure I hid in this stump's orifice.
scr_text_slash_scr_text_gml_1473_0: * Feast for yourself, my main man.
scr_text_slash_scr_text_gml_1475_0: * Kris, do you want to, um, try it?
scr_text_slash_scr_text_gml_1493_0:
* It's my secret stash.
* A little snackeroo from me to you...
scr_text_slash_scr_text_gml_1498_0: * C'mon, you're just pretending to eat it!
scr_text_slash_scr_text_gml_1500_0: * Haha, yeah! That's what I do, too!
scr_text_slash_scr_text_gml_1508_0: * (There was a honeypot of salsa inside the stump.)
scr_text_slash_scr_text_gml_151_0:
* Umm, r-really?
* Are you sure?
* It's fairly important.
scr_text_slash_scr_text_gml_1522_0: * Look, if no one else will eat it, I'll try it!
scr_text_slash_scr_text_gml_1523_0:
* ... there's a jar of... blood...?
* In here.
scr_text_slash_scr_text_gml_1525_0:
* No, no.
* It's merely a pot of free-range salsa.
scr_text_slash_scr_text_gml_1527_0: * Thanks, that's actually more gross somehow.
scr_text_slash_scr_text_gml_152_0: * And... um, in my opinion, it's a really nice \cYPROPHECY\cW!
scr_text_slash_scr_text_gml_153_0: * I think you'd quite like it!
scr_text_slash_scr_text_gml_1560_0: * Kris, honey, you have grown up so much...
scr_text_slash_scr_text_gml_1561_0: * Someday soon you will be going off to university as well...
scr_text_slash_scr_text_gml_1564_0: * You asked when your horns were going to grow in?

scr_text_slash_scr_text_gml_2553_0: * ... huh? Why don't I ask my mom for the key?
scr_text_slash_scr_text_gml_2554_0: * I... I mean, um... I... you know,
scr_text_slash_scr_text_gml_2555_0: * She doesn't like it when I bother her when she's working.
scr_text_slash_scr_text_gml_2556_0: * Don't worry, OK? I'll just go over to Catti's.
scr_text_slash_scr_text_gml_2560_0: * Umm... Kris...? Are you feeling alright?
scr_text_slash_scr_text_gml_2562_0: * Oh! I don't mean to sound like something's wrong with you.
scr_text_slash_scr_text_gml_2565_0: * Why did you go to the hospital to see my dad...?
scr_text_slash_scr_text_gml_2566_0: * I mean, I'm sure he appreciated it, but... um...
scr_text_slash_scr_text_gml_2567_0: * Gosh, I'm sorry, Kris. Forget I said anything!
scr_text_slash_scr_text_gml_2571_0: * Tell Azzy I said hi, Kris!
scr_text_slash_scr_text_gml_2586_0: * I mean, that's just what I was hoping, but...
scr_text_slash_scr_text_gml_2587_0: * W-wait, this isn't another trick, is it, Kris?
scr_text_slash_scr_text_gml_2588_0: * Like when you put ketchup on your arms and told me it was blood?
scr_text_slash_scr_text_gml_2589_0: * ... r-really? You're serious? You're totally serious?
scr_text_slash_scr_text_gml_2590_0: * ... gosh, then maybe I should try talking to her...
scr_text_slash_scr_text_gml_2591_0: * B-but if I die, you're paying for my funeral, Kris!
scr_text_slash_scr_text_gml_2592_0: * (Though, honestly, if she's nice I might die, too...)
scr_text_slash_scr_text_gml_2596_0: * She WHAT? She smashed you against the LOCKERS?
scr_text_slash_scr_text_gml_2597_0: * Gosh, Kris, I'm really sorry. That's just awful.
scr_text_slash_scr_text_gml_2598_0: * I... I'd THOUGHT Susie was good, just...
scr_text_slash_scr_text_gml_2599_0: * Maybe it would take someone special to find her good side.
scr_text_slash_scr_text_gml_2600_0: * ... but she really IS terrible, isn't she...?
scr_text_slash_scr_text_gml_2601_0: * Kris... I'm SO sorry you have to go through this.
scr_text_slash_scr_text_gml_2602_0: * In fact, I wonder if... d-do you think...?
scr_text_slash_scr_text_gml_2603_0: * I wonder if Alphys would let us switch partners, I mean?
scr_text_slash_scr_text_gml_2604_0: * You know, so you wouldn't have to be the one, who, um,
scr_text_slash_scr_text_gml_2605_0: * Gets to be, slammed into lockers, and stuff, anymore.
scr_text_slash_scr_text_gml_2606_0: * (Wait, I don't think I phrased that correctly...)
scr_text_slash_scr_text_gml_2610_0:
* What?
* She was EATING the chalk???
scr_text_slash_scr_text_gml_2612_0: * Wait! You're teasing me, aren't you, Kris?
scr_text_slash_scr_text_gml_2613_0: * L-like when you told me ICE-E was real and eats kids...
scr_text_slash_scr_text_gml_2614_0: * So Dess smacked you with a wiffle bat 'til you stopped lying.
scr_text_slash_scr_text_gml_2615_0: * ... huh? You're telling the truth? Seriously?
scr_text_slash_scr_text_gml_2617_0: * Umm, then... what color chalk does she like?
scr_text_slash_scr_text_gml_2618_0: * And, do you think she likes the thin or the thick kind...?
scr_text_slash_scr_text_gml_2619_0: * (Wait, maybe making her a lunchbox full of chalk is stupid...)
scr_text_slash_scr_text_gml_2623_0: * Seriously, Kris? But I help you ALL the time!
scr_text_slash_scr_text_gml_2624_0: * The LEAST you can do is give me a LITTLE information!
scr_text_slash_scr_text_gml_2625_0: * Like, d-does she like metal music!?
scr_text_slash_scr_text_gml_2626_0: * Is she really an obligate carnivore!?
scr_text_slash_scr_text_gml_2627_0: * D... does she really have a tail underneath her jacket!?
scr_text_slash_scr_text_gml_2629_0: * Sorry Kris, it's not any of my business, is it...?
scr_text_slash_scr_text_gml_2640_0: * (If you go to bed, this chapter of your adventures will end.)
scr_text_slash_scr_text_gml_265_0: * ... you can skip text by pressing [~1]?
scr_text_slash_scr_text_gml_2665_0_b: * (If you go back to sleep, \cYyou may miss a lot of important things\cW.)
scr_text_slash_scr_text_gml_2677_0: * (For some reason, you decided to go back to sleep...)
scr_text_slash_scr_text_gml_2690_0: * BOO HOO, BOO HOO, UEE HEE HEE.
scr_text_slash_scr_text_gml_2692_0: * BUT LO, THREE VISITORS STANDING INSIDE?
scr_text_slash_scr_text_gml_2695_0: * Nice to meet you! I'm Ralsei, this is Kris, and...
scr_text_slash_scr_text_gml_2697_0: * So, what the hell are you doing in there?
scr_text_slash_scr_text_gml_2699_0:
* I AM INNOCENT, INNOCENT.
* I JUST WANTED TO PLAY A GAME, GAME.
scr_text_slash_scr_text_gml_2700_0: * BUT THE BORING KINGS FOUND SUCH FUN TO BE A TROUBLE.
scr_text_slash_scr_text_gml_2701_0: * AS PUNISHMENT, THEY CRAVED TO IMPRISON MY BODY.
scr_text_slash_scr_text_gml_2702_0: * BUT I'M FAST, FAST, CLEVER, CLEVER.
scr_text_slash_scr_text_gml_2703_0: * THEY LOST THE CHASE, AND LOCKED UP THEIR ENTIRE RACE,
scr_text_slash_scr_text_gml_2704_0: * BUILDING A PRISON AROUND THE WHOLE WORLD. NOW I'M THE ONLY FREE ONE.
scr_text_slash_scr_text_gml_2706_0: * Huh? Free? But you're clearly the one behind bars...
scr_text_slash_scr_text_gml_2708_0: * THINGS DON'T SEEM SUCH FROM HERE, LIGHTNERS!
scr_text_slash_scr_text_gml_2710_0: * Well, sounds like you don't need any help, then.
scr_text_slash_scr_text_gml_2712_0:
* THAT IS UN-SO.
* I GROW LONELY IN MY LITTLE FREEDOM.
scr_text_slash_scr_text_gml_2713_0: * SO, SHALL YOU PLAY A GAME WITH ME, ME...?
scr_text_slash_scr_text_gml_2714_0: * I'LL SHOW YOU WHAT IT MEANS TO BE FREE!
scr_text_slash_scr_text_gml_2719_0: * FIND THE KEY, AND I'LL LET YOU BE FREE, FREE.
scr_text_slash_scr_text_gml_2720_0: * THE KEY IS HIDDEN FROM THE EYES. THE OLD SHOPKEEPER KNOWS A SECRET.
scr_text_slash_scr_text_gml_2732_0: * FIND THE KEY, AND I'LL LET YOU BE FREE, FREE.
scr_text_slash_scr_text_gml_2733_0: * THE KEY IS HIDDEN FROM THE EYES. THE OLD SHOPKEEPER KNOWS A SECRET.
scr_text_slash_scr_text_gml_2738_0: * BOO HOO, BOO HOO, UEE HEE HEE!!
scr_text_slash_scr_text_gml_2739_0: * HOW CAN YOU REFUSE, WHEN YOU ARE ALREADY PLAYING...?
scr_text_slash_scr_text_gml_2749_0: * UEE HEE HEE, THE KEY, THE KEY.
scr_text_slash_scr_text_gml_274_0: * Listening to me talk, because you wanted to?
scr_text_slash_scr_text_gml_2750_0: * A MARVELLOUS FUN IS ABOUT TO BREAK FREE.
scr_text_slash_scr_text_gml_275_0: * I'll try to make it worth your while, Kris!
scr_text_slash_scr_text_gml_2766_0: * (You put the Door Key in front of the Door.)
scr_text_slash_scr_text_gml_2771_0: * YOU CAME TOO FAR! YOUR CHOICE HAS RUN OUT!
scr_text_slash_scr_text_gml_2794_0: * Hey! You're the chumps that beat me up earlier!
scr_text_slash_scr_text_gml_2795_0: * There's no way I'll forgive you, so scram!
scr_text_slash_scr_text_gml_2807_0: * We're sorry, we made a mistake earlier.
scr_text_slash_scr_text_gml_2808_0: * We promise we won't do it again!
scr_text_slash_scr_text_gml_280_0: * Right! In the case you read very quickly.
scr_text_slash_scr_text_gml_2810_0: * Huh...? You're apologizing? I guess I'll forgive you then...
scr_text_slash_scr_text_gml_2811_0: * (Your violence against a single Rudinn was forgiven!)
scr_text_slash_scr_text_gml_281_0: * Or you're tired of what's being said.
scr_text_slash_scr_text_gml_2823_0: * Heh, you wanna act that way, huh...?
scr_text_slash_scr_text_gml_2824_0: * Forgive me or I'll crush you, dweeb!!
scr_text_slash_scr_text_gml_2826_0: * I... I'm sorry!!! I forgive you!!! Here, take this Choco Diamond!
scr_text_slash_scr_text_gml_282_0: * ... no need to skip my text, right, Kris?
scr_text_slash_scr_text_gml_2832_0: * I'm sorry, but we don't have any room...
scr_text_slash_scr_text_gml_2834_0: * Too late, I already ate it.
scr_text_slash_scr_text_gml_2845_0:
* (It's a music player.)
* (Listen to the contents?)
scr_text_slash_scr_text_gml_2867_0: * (Where will you ride the elevator to?)
scr_text_slash_scr_text_gml_293_0:
* Oh, Kris!
* It's the training dummy I made!
scr_text_slash_scr_text_gml_294_0: * Now seems like a great chance to prepare for the enemy.
scr_text_slash_scr_text_gml_295_0: * Would you like me to teach you how to fight?
scr_text_slash_scr_text_gml_2977_0: * I know you wanna give a REAL goodbye to everyone, right?
scr_text_slash_scr_text_gml_2978_0: * I mean, I'm ALL for leaving right away, but...
scr_text_slash_scr_text_gml_2979_0: * Y'know, we could go back a sec. If you wanted.
scr_text_slash_scr_text_gml_2986_0: * Well, then what are we waiting for?
scr_text_slash_scr_text_gml_2992_0: * Let's at least say goodbye to Lancer!
scr_text_slash_scr_text_gml_3002_0: * If you can beat me, I'll go back to being a good guy.
scr_text_slash_scr_text_gml_3004_0: * YOU guys will have to become bad guys with US...
scr_text_slash_scr_text_gml_3007_0: * Ho ho ho!!! Our wish is your command!!!
scr_text_slash_scr_text_gml_3016_0: * We were just gonna thrash you anyway, so...
scr_text_slash_scr_text_gml_3036_0_b: * Kris, honey, you have grown up so much...
scr_text_slash_scr_text_gml_3037_0: * Someday soon you will be going off to university as well...
scr_text_slash_scr_text_gml_3040_0: * You asked when your horns were going to grow in?
scr_text_slash_scr_text_gml_3041_0: * So we bought that headband with the little red horns on it.
scr_text_slash_scr_text_gml_3042_0: * Oh, you wore it for months! Whatever happened to it?
scr_text_slash_scr_text_gml_3044_0: * Remember that video-game you and Asriel used to play?
scr_text_slash_scr_text_gml_3045_0: * What was it called...? Super Smashing Fighters?
scr_text_slash_scr_text_gml_3046_0: * When he was very little, he LOVED the green lizard from that.
scr_text_slash_scr_text_gml_3047_0: * We even had a birthday party for him themed around it.
scr_text_slash_scr_text_gml_3048_0: * Your father painted all these eggs with spots as decoration...
scr_text_slash_scr_text_gml_3050_0: * Until the next day, your father cooked them all for breakfast.
scr_text_slash_scr_text_gml_3052_0: * Ever since, he's hated that book about eating green eggs!
scr_text_slash_scr_text_gml_3056_0: * Kris, since only you and I are living here right now...
scr_text_slash_scr_text_gml_3057_0: * It feels... just a bit lonely, does it not...?
scr_text_slash_scr_text_gml_3058_0: * But, fortunately, sharing a warm, freshly-made pie,
scr_text_slash_scr_text_gml_3059_0: * Is the perfect cure for such a condition.
scr_text_slash_scr_text_gml_3060_0: * ... as long as I get to eat some, of course.
scr_text_slash_scr_text_gml_3064_0: * Oh, Kris...? Flowers? For your mother...?
scr_text_slash_scr_text_gml_3067_0: * These are from HIM, are they not.
scr_text_slash_scr_text_gml_3069_0: * Err, well, worry not, Kris, I will...
scr_text_slash_scr_text_gml_3078_0: * Kris, perhaps you should go to bed early tonight...
scr_text_slash_scr_text_gml_3079_0: * You do not look quite yourself.
scr_text_slash_scr_text_gml_308_0: * Right, you already fought Lancer, didn't you...?
scr_text_slash_scr_text_gml_309_0: * I was so excited to teach you, I absolutely blanked!
scr_text_slash_scr_text_gml_310_0:
* ... b-but, um...
* Just in case you forgot anything...
scr_text_slash_scr_text_gml_311_0:
* Here!
* I made a Manual for you and Susie!
scr_text_slash_scr_text_gml_3142_0:
* Marga riba!
* That cake!
* It's seething with power!
scr_text_slash_scr_text_gml_3143_0:
* It's my cake, isn't it!?
* Did you repair it!?
* Will you return it!?
scr_text_slash_scr_text_gml_314_0_b: * Press [~1] to open the menu and use it in your ITEMS.
scr_text_slash_scr_text_gml_3152_0: * Edamame! My old cake! I'm so happy I could spin!
scr_text_slash_scr_text_gml_3153_0: * My friend, share in my riches! I have many worse cakes I do not want!
scr_text_slash_scr_text_gml_3154_0: * If you're not carrying a Cake, come here and I'll give you one! Forever!
scr_text_slash_scr_text_gml_3156_0: * (You traded the TopCake for the SpinCake.)
scr_text_slash_scr_text_gml_3157_0: * Now, I'm going to continue to spin and cry! Spin and cry!
scr_text_slash_scr_text_gml_3162_0: * Sweet in cake, but not in character! A tragedy!!
scr_text_slash_scr_text_gml_3174_0: * Mama miba! How are you enjoying my rejected pastries?
scr_text_slash_scr_text_gml_3178_0: * Mom amiga! You want an inferior cake, my friend?
scr_text_slash_scr_text_gml_3187_0: * Please take this cake! It's worthless, my dear friend!
scr_text_slash_scr_text_gml_3192_0: * Mama shiba! You're carrying too many things that aren't cakes!
scr_text_slash_scr_text_gml_3197_0: * I understand!! Too much cake will make you spin and cry!!
scr_text_slash_scr_text_gml_3233_0:
Lost sleep
from being
Susie's partner
scr_text_slash_scr_text_gml_323_0:
* Oh my^2!
* The Great Door is opened?!
scr_text_slash_scr_text_gml_3241_0: * You didn't lose sleep over it, did you?
scr_text_slash_scr_text_gml_324_0: * No wonder Lancer was able to come through...
scr_text_slash_scr_text_gml_3250_0: * You say, with no negative intonation at all.
scr_text_slash_scr_text_gml_3252_0: * Kris, as your teacher, there's, um, a...
scr_text_slash_scr_text_gml_3253_0: * A limit. To the advice I'm qualified for.
scr_text_slash_scr_text_gml_3254_0: * But if you're interested, I do have a recommendation.
scr_text_slash_scr_text_gml_3255_0: * There's, an, FPS game podcast that helps me sleep...
scr_text_slash_scr_text_gml_3261_0: * H... huh? Kris, that's, um... good? I think?
scr_text_slash_scr_text_gml_3263_0: * Staying up late talking to Asriel online again?
scr_text_slash_scr_text_gml_3264_0: * ... ah, wait, you... can't do that, right?
scr_text_slash_scr_text_gml_3265_0: * I... I hope the internet gets fixed soon.
scr_text_slash_scr_text_gml_3266_0: * I don't want to revert into my primal form.
scr_text_slash_scr_text_gml_326_0: * Kris, once we pass through this door...
scr_text_slash_scr_text_gml_3272_0:
Hanging out
alone in
the closet
scr_text_slash_scr_text_gml_3278_0: * (Kris! Help me out here! What do we say!?)
scr_text_slash_scr_text_gml_328_0: * A journey foretold exactly by the prophecy...
scr_text_slash_scr_text_gml_3291_0: * Y'know, just... chillin' out alone in the closet.
scr_text_slash_scr_text_gml_3292_0: * Just two friends, chillin' out in the closet, like normal.
scr_text_slash_scr_text_gml_3299_0: * Just gonna do some crimes and go to... jail.
scr_text_slash_scr_text_gml_329_0: * But, Kris, I believe YOUR choices are important, too.
scr_text_slash_scr_text_gml_330_0: * This world is full of all kinds of people, Kris.
scr_text_slash_scr_text_gml_331_0: * In the end, how we treat them makes all the difference.
scr_text_slash_scr_text_gml_3322_0: * Nothing wrong with a little extra fluffiness in your life.
scr_text_slash_scr_text_gml_3327_0: * You did not hug the dummy.
scr_text_slash_scr_text_gml_3328_0: * You won't take the path of fluffiness any longer.
scr_text_slash_scr_text_gml_332_0: * So let's try our best to get by without FIGHTing.
scr_text_slash_scr_text_gml_333_0: * If we can manage to do that...
scr_text_slash_scr_text_gml_3340_0: * ... have you come to humiliate me...?
scr_text_slash_scr_text_gml_334_0: * I believe this tale may have a happy ending.
scr_text_slash_scr_text_gml_3350_0: * ... hey, why the hell does HE get a giant water thing?
scr_text_slash_scr_text_gml_3354_0: * As I SUCKLE from this giant hamster bottle!
scr_text_slash_scr_text_gml_3355_0:
* Ha ha ha!!
* (Glub glub)
* Feel despair!!
scr_text_slash_scr_text_gml_3363_0: * Mr. King, the Lightners returned everyone here safely.
scr_text_slash_scr_text_gml_3364_0: * If you're willing to reconsider, then...
scr_text_slash_scr_text_gml_3366_0: * What? Live in a kingdom ruled by YOU?
scr_text_slash_scr_text_gml_3368_0: * Staying in this cell is far less humiliating.
scr_text_slash_scr_text_gml_3369_0: * Now, if you will excuse me.
scr_text_slash_scr_text_gml_336_0: * ... you may not... find the result favorable.
scr_text_slash_scr_text_gml_3370_0: * My giant hamster wheel is getting cold.
scr_text_slash_scr_text_gml_337_0: * ... oh, I'm sorry! Is that too much to ask?
scr_text_slash_scr_text_gml_3381_0: * Oh My That Was Actually Quite... Amusing
scr_text_slash_scr_text_gml_3382_0: * You Lifeform(s) Have Exceeded My Expectations
scr_text_slash_scr_text_gml_3383_0: * I Will Offer You A New, Exceedingly Benevolent Compromise
scr_text_slash_scr_text_gml_3385_0: * And There Is Only A Fifty Percent Chance I Will Reprogram Your Face
scr_text_slash_scr_text_gml_3387_0: * Perish In The Chill Of Absolute Destruction
scr_text_slash_scr_text_gml_3389_0: * Flourish Under The Warm Bosom Of My Hellish Reign
scr_text_slash_scr_text_gml_3398_0:
Lie and say
you want to
hear more
scr_text_slash_scr_text_gml_3415_0: * Little buddy! You aren't gonna BELIEVE this!!
scr_text_slash_scr_text_gml_3417_0: * Asriel!! You've GOT to tell Asriel RIGHT NOW!!
scr_text_slash_scr_text_gml_3418_0: * He's gonna be so proud of me!!!
scr_text_slash_scr_text_gml_3420_0: * Ah, Little BUDDY. How do I PUT it...
scr_text_slash_scr_text_gml_3421_0: * I... don't actually know!! I haven't met her in real life!!
scr_text_slash_scr_text_gml_3422_0: * But from the way she TEXTS?
scr_text_slash_scr_text_gml_3423_0: * God, Little Buddy. She must be STACKED.
scr_text_slash_scr_text_gml_3428_0: * Little buddy!! Here to hear about my, heh, GIRLFRIEND!?
scr_text_slash_scr_text_gml_3437_0: * So far, she's the perfect girl, little buddy.
scr_text_slash_scr_text_gml_343_0: * Kris, I knew you were a hero the moment I saw you.
scr_text_slash_scr_text_gml_3440_0: * And to top it off... she sent me a picture.
scr_text_slash_scr_text_gml_3441_0: * Of herself. Wearing a pizza bikini.
scr_text_slash_scr_text_gml_3442_0: * Little buddy, perhaps it is uncouth, but...
scr_text_slash_scr_text_gml_3443_0: * Look!!! LOOK AT THIS!!!! GOD DAMN!!!!
scr_text_slash_scr_text_gml_3445_0: * (It's several pixels that vaguely resemble a zoomed-in JPEG of a pepperoni pizza.)
scr_text_slash_scr_text_gml_3447_0: * Yes, I know what you're thinking, Little Buddy.
scr_text_slash_scr_text_gml_3448_0: * Her camera. Is not. Of the highest caliber.
scr_text_slash_scr_text_gml_3449_0: * But to a scholarly man of the world like myself,
scr_text_slash_scr_text_gml_3450_0: * This is what love looks like, Little Buddy.
scr_text_slash_scr_text_gml_3455_0: * That's right!! We don't need to say any more!!
scr_text_slash_scr_text_gml_3456_0: * Go ahead and tell Asriel right now!!!
scr_text_slash_scr_text_gml_3474_0: * (You took a look at the flavors.)
scr_text_slash_scr_text_gml_3486_0: * Heh, good idea. People put their mouth on those y'know.
scr_text_slash_scr_text_gml_3497_0: * HEY!! GET OUT OF THE ROAD!!
scr_text_slash_scr_text_gml_3499_0: * Anything I can help you with, punk?
scr_text_slash_scr_text_gml_349_0: * Kris, in the end, what you choose is up to you.
scr_text_slash_scr_text_gml_34_0: * You felt a feeling of relief.
scr_text_slash_scr_text_gml_3507_0: * Huh? A super-dangerous alternate world in the Library?
scr_text_slash_scr_text_gml_3508_0: * More are appearing? People might fall inside...?
scr_text_slash_scr_text_gml_350_0: * As long as you're happy with it, I'm happy too.
scr_text_slash_scr_text_gml_3510_0: * Hahah... You seriously think I'm gonna believe that?
scr_text_slash_scr_text_gml_3518_0: * Nothing to report, huh? At times like this...
scr_text_slash_scr_text_gml_3519_0: * Punks like you should be home playing video games.
scr_text_slash_scr_text_gml_351_0: * So just try your best, and don't worry!
scr_text_slash_scr_text_gml_3564_0: * Hi Kris!! Getting your project done? Eheheh...
scr_text_slash_scr_text_gml_3565_0: * O... oh, my bike...? It's eh... eheh, totaled...
scr_text_slash_scr_text_gml_3566_0: * I... um... I had a little crash, err...
scr_text_slash_scr_text_gml_3567_0: * You see, there was this p-police officer, and... er...
scr_text_slash_scr_text_gml_3569_0: * It's complicated. How are you doing?
scr_text_slash_scr_text_gml_3574_0: * K... Kris! D-did you need something...?
scr_text_slash_scr_text_gml_3583_0: * Kris, it's no secret the, er, police in this town are...
scr_text_slash_scr_text_gml_3584_0: * Err... how do I put this... just... um...
scr_text_slash_scr_text_gml_3587_0: * I mean they're s-symbolic! They barely do anything!

scr_text_slash_scr_text_gml_7511_0: * If you SPARE or PACIFY enough enemies of the same type, they will be RECRUITed.
scr_text_slash_scr_text_gml_7512_0: * RECRUITs will appear in your TOWN. Wonder what happens if you get them all...?
scr_text_slash_scr_text_gml_7513_0: * You can check the area's RECRUIT status at SAVE POINTS. Certain BOSSES are excluded.
scr_text_slash_scr_text_gml_7519_0: * You will now have access to a STORAGE menu at SAVE POINTS.
scr_text_slash_scr_text_gml_7520_0: * When you're out of space, ITEMs you find or BUY will be sent to your STORAGE.
scr_text_slash_scr_text_gml_7521_0: * Feel free to put things inside you might not be able to use yet.

scr_text_slash_scr_text_gml_993_0: * And the only other person in the theater was her!
scr_text_slash_scr_text_gml_994_0: * Then I went to QC's and ordered a Catpuccino...
scr_text_slash_scr_text_gml_995_0: * And she, like, was already drinking one!
scr_text_slash_scr_text_gml_996_0:
* She's SUCH a copycat!
* ... uhh, copygator?

Suitable for heroes.

Skull-emblazoned scythe-ax.
Reduces Rudebuster's cost by 10

snowflake

A scarf with colorful you-can-do-it
imagery. Gains more TP from criticals.

CHA-CHK!
You'd look cool holding it, Kris!

Make sure to charge it by
plugging it into the wall.

A scarf made of soft microfiber.
Balances attack and magic.

A sharp and scratchy scarf.
Worse healing, better attack.

A rejected sword cut into 2 pieces.
Not even you can equip this...

A scarf made of strange strings.
For those that abandon healing.

A ring with a snowglobe on it.
... is that someone inside?

A saber made of 10 cactus needles.
Fortunately, can deal more than 10 damage.
You want to... pierce my ears...?

An axe used to clear wastelands
in a fetid swamp. Not poison, but gross.
Could I wash it off first?
N-no way! Susie wouldn't use that!

A scarf that is warm and fuzzy, but with
a metal core that lets it keep its shape.
Twist it and... it's a wreath!

A dagger-like shard of the Black Knife.
Strikes the weakness of dark-element enemies.

Beginner's ax forged from the
mane of a dragon whelp.

A lance-like sword with red-and-white stripes.
Perfect for jousting.

A sword that is arbitrarily stronger
because it fits the setting of Chapter 5.
What is this, a barber pole?
Go, Kris! "1000 Moon Crescent Slash!" Faha!

A thin scarf with a deep sheen. Holy writing has
been pressed into it, imbuing it with magic.

An axe made of brambles. It's rumored its
wickedness infects anything it touches.

It has no special powers. However, in order to
attain this item, you became much stronger!

Shoes from a prestigious dancer.
Ralsei's PACIFY costs 0% TP.
... Susie beat up an old man!?
(You KNOW I can't wear normal shoes...)

A majestic sword with a white feathered hilt.

A mischievous blade. Attacks with this

A long, curved axe with an indent.
Scoop up HP when you attack.

A scarf which says "I <3 Flowery" on it.

A scarf that was torn to pieces in the
battle, revealing it was all for show.

Armour rings with a rose motif. Any thorns are

Wow! Something I actually want to wear?

A parasitic ivy whip with a nature's power.
